name: Chestnut Stuffing for Poultry
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Shortening (butter, chicken fat, or lard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a gash in each chestnut.
2. Place the chestnuts in an iron skillet with 1 tablespoon of butter and shake over hot flame for a few minutes.
3. Place the chestnuts in the oven for 10 minutes.
4. Remove the shells and skins from the cooked chestnuts.
5. Cover the blanched chestnuts with boiling salt water and cook until tender.
6. Strain the chestnuts and pass through a ricer.
7. Add the remaining ingredients (bread crumbs, shortening, salt, egg, celery, and poultry seasoning) to the riced chestnuts and mix well.
